channel.title: Daniel Sundfeld on CEDIS
channel.description: Recent content in Daniel Sundfeld on CEDIS

item.title: High performance computing and cloud computing
item.description: High-Performance Computing and Cloud Computing is a dynamic and essential field in computer science, focused on the development and application of advanced computing systems capable of processing large amounts of data at extremely high speeds.

item.title: Laguna Project
item.description: This project aims to extend the massive processing of a data lake using a cloud architecture, utilizing Amazon Web Services (AWS) as the provider.

item.title: People
item.description: Adjunct Professor at the University of Brasília (UnB), working in the Software Engineering undergraduate program with a focus on parallel computing, high-performance computing, GPU, cloud computing, and bioinformatics.

item.title: Informational Management Support System for MCTI
item.description: Ongoing project focused on supporting informational management at the Ministry of Science, Technology and Innovation.

item.title: Serviços PI
item.description: Ongoing project on innovation and efficiency in retrieving intellectual property information at INPI.

item.title: Nimbus
item.description: Serverless cloud architecture for automatic code grading.

item.title: BioCloud
item.description: Framework for executing biotechnology applications across multiple AWS cloud platforms.

item.title: Cloud, IoT and Distributed Systems
item.description: Closed project on cloud computing, internet of things, and distributed systems.
